name: MongoDB 中间件基线 (CIS + 等保 2.0)
description: MongoDB 6.0/7.0 安全基线. 参考 CIS MongoDB 6 Benchmark.

rules.title: auth 启用
rules.description: 默认无认证, 必须 security.authorization=enabled

fix.command: F=/etc/mongod.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^\s*authorization:' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)authorization:.*|\1authorization: enabled|' "$F"; elif grep -Eq '^security:' "$F"; then sed -i -E '/^security:/a\  authorization: enabled' "$F"; else printf 'security:\n  authorization: enabled\n' >> "$F"; fi; if ! grep -Eq '^\s*authorization:\s*enabled' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi

F=/etc/mongod.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; sed -i -E 's|^(\s*bindIp:\s*)0\.0\.0\.0.*|\1127.0.0.1|; s|^(\s*bind_ip\s*=\s*)0\.0\.0\.0.*|\1127.0.0.1|' "$F"; if grep -Eq 'bindIp:\s*0\.0\.0\.0|bind_ip\s*=\s*0\.0\.0\.0' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi
fix.suggestion: bindIp: 127.0.0.1,10.0.0.5 (autofix 仅将 0.0.0.0 收敛为 127.0.0.1, 如需远程访问请手动追加内网 IP)
net.tls.mode: requireTLS + tls.certificateKeyFile (需先签发并部署证书, 强制 TLS 会断开未配置客户端, 不可自动)
systemd User=mongod (改运行用户需同步 chown dbPath/日志, 否则启动失败, 不可自动)

fix.command: U=$(id -u mongod >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo mongod || echo mongodb); for D in /var/lib/mongo /var/lib/mongodb; do [ -d "$D" ] && { chmod 700 "$D"; chown -R "$U:$U" "$D"; }; done
F=/etc/mongod.conf; chmod 644 "$F"; G=$(getent group mongod >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo mongod || (getent group mongodb >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo mongodb || echo root)); chown "root:$G" "$F"

rules.title: auditLog 启用
rules.description: MongoDB Enterprise 审计或 systemLog 详细化

fix.command: F=/etc/mongod.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^\s*verbosity:' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)verbosity:.*|\1verbosity: 1|' "$F"; elif grep -Eq '^systemLog:' "$F"; then sed -i -E '/^systemLog:/a\  verbosity: 1' "$F"; else printf 'systemLog:\n  verbosity: 1\n' >> "$F"; fi; if ! grep -Eq '^\s*verbosity:\s+[1-9]' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi
fix.suggestion: auditLog.destination: file + auditLog.path (Enterprise 专属审计需手动配置; 自动修复改用提升 systemLog.verbosity 满足社区版基线)

fix.command:
F=/etc/mongod.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; U=$(id -u mongod >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo mongod || echo mongodb); LP=/var/log/mongodb/mongod.log; mkdir -p /var/log/mongodb; touch "$LP"; chown "$U:$U" "$LP" /var/log/mongodb; if grep -Eq '^systemLog:' "$F"; then grep -Eq '^\s*destination:' "$F" && sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)destination:.*|\1destination: file|' "$F" || sed -i -E '/^systemLog:/a\  destination: file' "$F"; grep -Eq '^\s*path:' "$F" || sed -i -E "/^systemLog:/a\  path: $LP" "$F"; else printf 'systemLog:
  destination: file
  path: %s
' "$LP" >> "$F"; fi; if ! grep -Eq '^\s*destination:\s+file' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 禁默认 admin 账户名

fix.suggestion: db.createUser({user:'mxcwpp_admin',...}); db.dropUser('admin') (删账户需先建等权新账户并验证, 误删会锁死管理权限, 不可自动)

fix.command: F=/etc/mongod.conf; [ -f "$F" ] || { echo "config not found: $F"; exit 1; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^\s*javascriptEnabled:' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)javascriptEnabled:.*|\1javascriptEnabled: false|' "$F"; elif grep -Eq '^security:' "$F"; then sed -i -E '/^security:/a\  javascriptEnabled: false' "$F"; else printf 'security:\n  javascriptEnabled: false\n' >> "$F"; fi; if ! grep -Eq '^\s*javascriptEnabled:\s*false' "$F"; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo "verify failed, rolled back"; exit 1; fi
